notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Kyle Tucker scores. Will Smith to 3rd. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andy Pages rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Kyle Tucker scores. Will Smith to 3rd. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds out, second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Teoscar Hernández to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds out, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Casey Schmitt.

notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt plunked
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt hit by pitch. Luis Arraez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee hit by pitch.
